meta.title: 321guess — Football Player Guessing Game
meta.description: A local co-op football player guessing game — play with a friend, no login required.

clubClub.title: Club × Club
clubClub.description: Two club badges — name a player who played for both.

countryClub.title: Country × Club
countryClub.description: A flag + a badge — name a player from that country who played for that club.

excludedCountries.heading: Countries to skip (flag)
excludedCountries.hint: Country × Club only: unchecked countries' flags won't appear as the question.

play.noSettings: No settings found — sending you home…
play.noAnswers: No matching players in our data — skip to next round.
